title: Fix missing navigation menu items after Version 20 deployment

requirements.summary: Restore all navigation menu items in the Header component that were visible before Version 20, ensuring authenticated users see 'My Events', 'Find Organizers', 'My Bookings', and 'Organizer Dashboard' links alongside the logout button
acceptanceCriteria: All navigation links ('My Events', 'Find Organizers', 'My Bookings', 'Organizer Dashboard') are visible in the desktop menu for authenticated users
Mobile menu hamburger displays all navigation options when opened
Logout button remains functional alongside other menu items
Navigation menu appearance matches the state before Version 20 deployment

file_operations.description: Review the conditional rendering logic for navigation menu items in both desktop and mobile views. Ensure that when a user is authenticated (identity is truthy), all navigation links ('My Events', 'Find Organizers', 'My Bookings', 'Organizer Dashboard') are rendered alongside the LoginButton. Check that no CSS classes are hiding these links and that the mobile menu (if using a hamburger toggle) includes all navigation items when opened. Restore any menu items that were accidentally removed or conditionally hidden during Version 20 deployment.

requirements.summary: Verify that the navigation menu conditional rendering logic correctly handles authenticated vs unauthenticated states without hiding menu items inappropriately
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users see appropriate landing page navigation
Authenticated users see full navigation menu with all role-appropriate links
No CSS or styling rules are hiding navigation items unintentionally

file_operations.description: Audit the authentication state checks and ensure that the conditional rendering for authenticated vs unauthenticated users is correct. Verify that unauthenticated users see the landing page navigation (e.g., logo, login button) and authenticated users see the full navigation menu with all role-appropriate links. Check that no inline styles, CSS classes, or display properties are unintentionally hiding navigation items. Test that the useInternetIdentity hook's identity value is being used correctly to determine visibility of menu items.

Review global CSS rules and custom styles to ensure no rules are unintentionally hiding navigation menu items. Check for any display:none, visibility:hidden, or opacity:0 rules that might be affecting navigation links. Verify that responsive breakpoint styles for mobile and desktop menus are not causing navigation items to disappear unexpectedly.
